growth_records.cite: Delaby et al. Phenotypic plasticity in cell elongation among closely related bacterial species. Nature Communications (2025). DOI:10.1038/s41467-025-60005-y. [PMC12130487]
growth_records.snippet: For dual short-pulse FDAA labeling in A. biprosthecum... The cells were grown in PYE at 26 °C for 5% of their doubling time (7 min).
growth_records.notes: Doubling time derived: pulse duration stated as '5% of their doubling time (7 min)', so doubling_time = 7/0.05 = 140 min = 2.333 h. mu = ln2/2.333 = 0.297 h^-1. [metadata completed from paper Methods: oxygen]
